name: event_id
description: Unique UUID of the outbox audit event.

name: event_type
description: Type of origination event (e.g. APPLICATION_CREATED, UNDERWRITING_OVERRIDE_APPLIED).

name: application_id
description: Associated loan or onboarding application ID.

name: underwriter_id
description: ID of loan officer executing override.

name: payload
description: Strongly typed native JSON structured event payload.

name: created_at
description: Event creation timestamp for daily partitioning.
